task_completion.description: Set up the ANCOVA analysis in JASP with correct variables.
task_completion.visual_evidence: JASP interface shows 'ANCOVA' selected with 'Exam' in the Dependent Variable box, 'Gender' in the Fixed Factors box, and 'Anxiety' in the Covariates box.

task_completion.description: Select required analysis options and generate results in JASP.
task_completion.visual_evidence: JASP results pane displays tables for Descriptive Statistics, Effect Size (η²), Marginal Means for Gender, and a test for Homogeneity of Regression Slopes (or checkboxes for these are ticked in the options panel).

task_completion.description: Save the JASP analysis file to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: JASP window title shows 'ExamAnxiety_ANCOVA.jasp' or a file manager/save dialog shows the file saved in '/home/ga/Documents/JASP/'.

task_completion.description: Create a text report containing the required statistical values.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor (e.g., gedit, nano) displaying 'ancova_report.txt' with F-statistic and p-value for Anxiety, F-statistic, p-value, and η² for Gender, marginal means for Male and Female, and the p-value for the Homogeneity of Regression Slopes.

task_completion.description: Include a one-sentence conclusion in the text report.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text report contains a concluding sentence stating whether Gender has a significant effect on Exam performance after controlling for Anxiety (should conclude it is non-significant based on p ≈ 0.949).

integrity.description: The agent used the JASP graphical interface to perform the analysis.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the JASP application menus, variable selection, and results pane, rather than just running a python script in the terminal.

integrity.description: The statistics in the text report match the generated JASP results.
integrity.visual_evidence: The numbers typed into 'ancova_report.txt' correspond to the values visible in the JASP results tables in earlier screenshots.

integrity.description: The text report was created and saved properly.
integrity.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal command (like echo/cat) was genuinely used to write to '/home/ga/Documents/JASP/ancova_report.txt'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected ANCOVA results: Anxiety covariate F ≈ 24.1, p ≈ 0.000003 (significant). Gender main effect F ≈ 0.004, p ≈ 0.949, η² ≈ 0.00003 (non-significant). Marginal means: Male ≈ 56.7, Female ≈ 56.4. Homogeneity of regression slopes p ≈ 0.330. The conclusion should state that Gender does NOT have a significant effect after controlling for Anxiety. Required output paths: '/home/ga/Documents/JASP/ExamAnxiety_ANCOVA.jasp' and '/home/ga/Documents/JASP/ancova_report.txt'.
